title: Stagflation looms over Europe as the Middle East conflict escalates
summary_full: Should hostilities persist, Europe could slide into a full-blown 1970s-style trap: inflation becoming self-reinforcing and sticky, growth turning chronically weak and job creation stalling
summary_public: Should hostilities persist, Europe could slide into a full-blown 1970s-style trap: inflation becoming self-reinforcing and sticky, growth turning chronically weak and job creation stalling
